parsed_review.summary: CP00-544 is a clean descriptor-only RP17 AI-governance pack covering 40 planned units (RP17.P08.M02.S15-RP17.P08.M04.S12) across the M02 Type-And-Shape tail, the full M03 Primary Implementation Slice, and the M04 Secondary Workflow Slice head. The pack makes no production_ready claim (manifest production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, implementation_layer=descriptor, status=implemented_pending_review); its only claim is descriptor verification, which is fully supported. Distributions in registry CP544_PACK_BINDING/REQUIREMENTS, the manifest, and the review baseline agree exactly (deliverables 20/16/2/2; micro phases 6/22/12; total 40). All no-write/no-real-data flags are false via freezeCp544Result and CP544_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION (writes_product_state, all dispatch_*_runtime, writes_audit_event, emits_hermes_runtime_receipt, loads_real_fixture_data = false; no_real_data=true). Hermes is used only as a descriptor evidence-packet identifier, not product runtime. Authority boundary is preserved everywhere: claude_is_final_approval=false, read_only with Read/Grep/Glob, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true, claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation=false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false. CP178+ review hardening is satisfied: readiness auth preflight passed (exit 0, 1455-byte valid JSON, is_error=false, non-zero stdout) and the inherited forbidden_review_evidence list rejects auth failures, zero-byte output, malformed/fenced JSON, tool-call-shaped output, and missing required fields. The validate-rp17 script deep-equals the contract projections (p08_implementation_workflow_slice_descriptor, cp544_requirements, cp544_no_write_attestation, current_pack, last historical_pack_binding=CP00-544) against freshly generated source, all 7 required public exports are wired through index.js, model.test.js carries three CP544 test blocks, and command-evidence.json records every required validation command at exit 0 including git diff --check. Unrelated dirty files (progress-control-room, the LDIP invalid-attempt JSON, and workbook docs) are explicitly partitioned into unrelated_dirty_files_preserved under the worktree_transition_policy and are correctly excluded from pack scope. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings.
